sections.title: If the player has a costume needle

lines.speaker: Costumer
lines.text: Have you still got that needle safe and secure?

lines.speaker: Costumer
lines.text: You were very brave for going on stage to confront a killer. Looks like you did well to get her to surrender without damaging her costume.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was very well made. Makes the job of not damaging it much easier!

lines.speaker: Costumer
lines.text: Why thank you! I credit my needles for the good work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would I be able to get one of them for my own purposes?

lines.speaker: Costumer
lines.text: I suppose I could part with one... If you're careful not to lose it.
